hero.headline:
44 Years of Pools Your Family
Will Love
hero.subheadline: DesRochers Backyard Pools has been turning Northern Illinois backyards into award-winning retreats since 1982. From custom pool construction to weekly maintenance, our family takes care of yours so you can skip the stress and dive straight in.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it pristine year after year, DesRochers handles it all. Three retail stores, one trusted family name.

cards.title: Fiberglass Pool Construction
cards.description: Award-winning fiberglass inground pools custom-designed for your backyard. Our national recognition speaks to the quality we build into every project.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Pool Construction
cards.description: Expert vinyl liner pool installations tailored to your space and budget. Professional design consultation through completion with the DesRochers quality guarantee.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Authorized Caldera Spas dealer with full selection on display. Professional installation, delivery, and ongoing service for year-round relaxation.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly and seasonal pool care that keeps your water crystal clear. Chemical balancing, equipment checks, and cleaning handled by true pool professionals.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Stress-free seasonal transitions for your pool. We handle every step of opening and winterizing so your investment stays protected year-round.

cards.title: Pool Repair & Liner Replacement
cards.description: Fiberglass repair, vinyl liner replacement, and equipment fixes other companies cannot handle. We restore damaged pools to like-new condition.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We will visit your backyard, discuss your vision, and provide an honest quote with no pressure and no hidden fees.

steps.title: We Bring It to Life
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles every detail from permits to final touches. The DesRochers family works alongside you through the entire process.

steps.title: Enjoy Generations of Fun
steps.description: Dive into your new backyard oasis. And with three retail locations and a full service team, we are here for you every season from here on out.

about.label: Why Northern Illinois Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats You Like Family
about.description: Since 1982, the DesRochers family has been building pools and relationships across Northern Illinois. What started as one family's passion has grown into an award-winning operation with three retail locations, but we have never lost the personal touch. Our staff knows your name, remembers your pool, and treats your backyard like their own.

features.title: 44 Years of Family Tradition
features.description: Three generations of pool expertise passed down through the DesRochers family. That depth of knowledge shows in every pool we build and service.

features.title: National Award-Winning Quality
features.description: Our pool designs have earned national recognition for unparalleled construction quality. When you choose DesRochers, you get the best in the industry.

features.title: Your Complete Pool Partner
features.description: Build, supply, maintain, and repair, all under one roof. Three fully stocked retail locations in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris are always nearby.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, honest quote. We walk you through every cost so you know exactly what you are paying for before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: Our "DesRochers Quality" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with our work, we will make it right at no additional cost. With 44 years of award-winning construction behind us, we stake our family name on every pool we build and every service call we make. Your satisfaction is not just a promise, it is our legacy.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most fiberglass pool installations are completed in 2-4 weeks, while vinyl liner pools typically take 4-8 weeks depending on complexity. We provide a detailed timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated throughout the entire process.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you did not build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our service team maintains and repairs pools of all types, regardless of who built them. We have even fixed major mistakes left by other pool companies and restored those pools to like-new condition.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Wilmington, Shorewood, Morris, Joliet, Plainfield, New Lenox, Minooka, Channahon, Essex, and surrounding communities throughout Northern Illinois and Will County. With three retail locations, we are never far away.

faqs.question: Should I choose fiberglass or vinyl liner?
faqs.answer: Both are excellent options and we specialize in both. Fiberglass pools install faster and require less maintenance, while vinyl liner pools offer more customization in shape and size. We will help you choose the best fit during your consultation.

faqs.question: Do you sell pool supplies and chemicals?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our three fully stocked retail locations in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris carry everything you need including chemicals, supplies, accessories, and premium patio furniture. Our retail staff are true pool professionals who can answer any question.

testimonials.name: K. G.
testimonials.text: Our pool has been crystal clear all summer! We are customers for life!!!

testimonials.name: Jim K.
testimonials.text: DesRochers didn't only fix major mistakes by another pool company, they made it look brand new. Could not recommend them more highly.

testimonials.name: Leo R.
testimonials.text: We're still impressed with the level of service this company provides. Over 10 years as a customer and they still treat us like we're their only client.
